description.name: Ticket BOT
description.tagline: AI-Powered Ticket Replies for Faster, Smarter Support
description.short: Seamlessly integrate OpenAI into WHMCS to auto-suggest or draft professional ticket responses, helping your support team reply faster and more efficiently.
description.long: Ticket BOT is a powerful WHMCS addon that leverages the intelligence of OpenAI to streamline your support workflow. With this addon, your support agents can instantly generate AI-powered reply suggestions inside WHMCS tickets—saving time, improving accuracy, and ensuring consistent communication. Whether it's drafting complete responses or assisting with tone and formatting, Ticket BOT enhances productivity while maintaining a human touch. Reduce response times, cut repetitive typing, and deliver better customer support effortlessly.
